properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 46/15
1. ANDOEYA TEST CENTER WILL CONDUCT A NUMBER OF LIVE FIRINGS WITH 30MM AMMUNITION FROM
NORDMELA, ANDOEYA, IN THE TIME PERIOD FROM MAY 18TH - 20TH 2015. THE LIVE FIRINGS WILL BE
CONDUCTED BETWEEN 09:00 AND 21:00 LOCAL TIME IN THE ANNOUNCED TIME PERIOD.
VESSELS MUST NAVIGATE WITH CAUTION IN THEFOLLOWING DANGER AREA DURING THE ANNOUNCED TIME PERIODS:

A. 69° 04.75' N, 15° 33.30' E
B. 69° 12.90' N, 15° 01.70' E
C. 69° 16.70' N, 15° 10.70' E
D. 69° 08.70' N, 15° 42.60' E
E. 69° 04.75' N, 15° 33.30' E
